prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科约4484名→2023年约3669名（前移）→2024年约14248名（大幅后移，疑似断档）→2025年物理类约6623名（明显回升）。2024年位次异常后移近万名，2 025年已大幅回弹至6623名，接近2022-2023年水平，但仍有约2000名的差距；本省理科/物理类计划：2022年20人→2023年20人→2024年22人→2025年26人→2026年 26人。2025年扩招4人后，2026年计划持平，未进一步扩招，对竞争影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名约第80名（2026年），近年 排名稳定在80名左右，学校层次在211中属中上水平；2023年声誉偏负面（副校长实名举报校长材料造假事件）；2025年声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌）；2 026年声誉偏负面（学术不端事件）。抖音热度排名第77位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度不高。整体声誉偏负面，但影响程度有限；管理科学与工程为A级 学科（第五轮学科评估），是该校最强学科；此外机械工程、电气工程等工科专业实力较强，与合肥工业大学本部共享学科资源。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及 其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度高热/偏热，与该校工科定位契合；土木建筑类明显劝退。宁夏2026年高考总人数约66000人（不确定标记），较2025年物理类44491 人+历史类21406人=65897人基本持平，竞争压力变化不大。；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）位于安徽省，属于华东地区，对宁夏考生 而言属于跨省就读。该校在宁夏招生规模较小（26人），地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升至6623名的恢复趋势、2026年招生计划持平、宁夏考生总 数基本稳定、声誉偏负面但影响有限等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准上小幅后移。预测最低位次约6703名，区间6203-7203名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, science approximately 4484th → 2023 approximately 3669th (moved forward) → 2024 approximately 14248th (significantly moved backward, suspected gap) → 2025 physics category approximately 6623rd (obvious rebound). In 2024, the ranking abnormally moved backward by nearly 10,000 places, and in 2025 it rebounded significantly to 6623rd, close to the 2022-2023 level, but still about 2000 places behind; local science/physics category plan: 2022 20 people → 2023 20 people → 2024 22 people → 2025 26 people → 2026 26 people. After expanding enrollment by 4 people in 2025, the 2026 plan remains unchanged, with no further expansion, having a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science China University Ranking approximately 80th (2026), ranking stable around 80th in recent years, school level is upper-middle among 211 universities; 2023 reputation slightly negative (vice principal publicly reported principal for material fraud); 2025 reputation slightly negative (popular major admission cutoff plummeted); 2026 reputation slightly negative (academic misconduct incident). Douyin popularity ranking 77th, rated as 'average', low exposure on short video platforms. Overall reputation slightly negative, but impact limited; Management Science and Engineering is A-level discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the strongest discipline of the university; additionally, mechanical engineering, electrical engineering and other engineering majors are relatively strong, sharing disciplinary resources with the main campus of Hefei University of Technology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electrical engineering and its automation, electronic information/communication and other engineering majors have high/relatively high social popularity, aligning with the university's engineering positioning; civil engineering and architecture are clearly discouraged. Ningxia 2026 total college entrance exam takers approximately 66,000 (uncertain mark), compared to 2025 physics category 44,491 people + history category 21,406 people = 65,897 people, basically flat, competitive pressure changes little. Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Anhui Province, belonging to the East China region, which is an inter-provincial study for Ningxia candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Ningxia is small (26 people), so regional preference impact is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recovery trend of the 2025 ranking rebounding significantly to 6623rd, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, the total number of Ningxia candidates basically stable, and the slightly negative reputation but limited impact, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the 2026 physics category will slightly move backward from the 2025 baseline. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 6703rd, range 6203-7203rd.
